chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Hi the topic is articulation point and bi-connected components.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So let us know first what is an articulation point.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: In a graph if there is any vertex whose removal will disconnect the graph into multiple components

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: then that vertex is called as articulation point.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: In this graph I have taken an example this 3 is a vertex if you remove this 3 then this

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: 1, 4 and 2 will form one piece that is one component 5 and 6 will form another component

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: if I remove this 3 that's how 3 is an articulation point.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If a graph is representing some network road network or computer networks then we don't

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: want any articulation point.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If that articulation point is having any problem then the network will break into multiple

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: components.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Even if anything is failing in the network also network should remain as intact as a

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: one single component.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So that is the problem of articulation point.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So we prefer that articulation point should not be there in the graph.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If there is an articulation point we will like to remove that articulation point.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So the solution is if you know what are the components in this one like I can directly

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: see that 1, 4 and 2 and 5, 6 are two different components just join an edge between them.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If you connect an edge now there is no articulation point in the graph.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If you remove 3 also this 5, 6 will be connected via 4 and if 4 is also removed the probability

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: that multiple nodes are failing is less.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So anyway if 3 is removed then the graph will not break into multiple pieces so there is

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: no articulation point.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So how to remove articulation point?

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Connect the components with an edge.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: That's all about articulation point.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now we want a procedure to find out articulation point just by looking at a graph we are able

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: to see this one but how our computers or machines can do that so for that there should be a

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: procedure or an algorithm.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So now I will explain you the algorithm for finding articulation point.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So the procedure is first step prepare a defer search spanning tree for this graph.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So first prepare a defer search spanning tree.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: I don't want result I want spanning tree.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So if I start from vertex 1 then I can go on vertex 4 then from there I will go to vertex

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: 3 then I will go to vertex 5 from there I will go to vertex 6 and from 6 there is an

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: edge to 3.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now there is no more connected vertices for 6 come back to 5 and come back to 3 from 3

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: there is a vertex that is 2 and from 2 there is an edge to 1 and 2 there is no more vertices

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: connected 3 also nothing is connected 4 also nothing is adjacent to it so 4 is completely

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: explored 1 is also explored.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So all are explored now this is the defer search spanning tree I got this is the first

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: step we are finding articulation point.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now for this defer search tree mention discovery time or defer search number for each vertex

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: in the order in which they are visited.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So defer search number I will write just d, d is 1 then discovery time is 2 discovery

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: time was 3 next this we have visited so discovery time is 4 and discovery time is 5 and discovery

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: time of this one is 6.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So this is the order in which the vertices are visited.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So if I write the vertices 1 2 3 4 5 6 then their discovery times are 1 2 is 6 then 3

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: was visited at 3 and 4 at 2 5 at 4 and 6 and 5 5 at 4 and 6 at 5 these are the discovery

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: times.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now we have to find out the lowest discovery number or defer search number reachable from

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: any vertex by taking one back edge.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So these are called as actually back edge.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So from 1 I can go to descendants and descendants and take this 2 and come back here.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So from 1 lowest number is 1 only then from 2 the lowest number that is reachable from

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: 2 is d 1 right from 3 from 3 I can go to 2 and then to 1 so 1.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So this means that what we are trying to find out is there is some path that is going back

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: to the parent right from 3 if I go downwards also there is a path to the parent.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Then for 4 from 4 I can go to 3 then 2 then I can take a back edge so the lowest number

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: reachable is 1 then for 5 I can go to 6 and then I can come back to 3 so this is 3 and

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: for 6 the lowest defer search number is 3 this is 3.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So for 5 and 6 it is 3.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now the next step is to find out articulation point.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So for that the condition is if there are 2 vertices u and v where u is a parent and

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: v is a child as per this defer search spanning tree.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If there are 2 vertices means one is parent one is child.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So this is parent this is child this is parent this is child this is parent so there are

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: many pair of vertices which are satisfying this relationship.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Then the lowest number of v if it is greater than or equal to d number of u.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If the lowest number of some vertex is greater or equal to the defer search or discovery

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: number of its parent then u is an articulation point u will be an articulation point.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So if this condition is true then u is an articulation point and this condition is for

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: all the vertices except root.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: This will not work for root.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So leaving root let us check other vertices 3 and 4.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So what is the lowest number of 3?

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: 3 is a child right lowest number of 3 is 1 and what is the discovery number of 4 defer

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: search number of 4 it is 2.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So this is 1 and this is 2.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So no this is not greater or equal.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Then let us take next vertex 3 and 5.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So let us say this is 3 and this is 5 so L of 5 and d of u.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So d of 3 what is d of 3?

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: d of 3 is 3 and L of 5 lowest number of 5 is 3.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: This is greater or equal.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So yes so who is an articulation point here 3 is an articulation point.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So this is a algorithm for finding articulation point.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So you can write up algorithm for this one to perform defer search and also maintain

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: defer search number if whenever you are getting any back edge so maintain the lowest number

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: also so this you can write on a program or an algorithm for this one.

chunks.text: Then after generating these two arrays we can compare whether any condition is true

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: here if any of such condition is true then that vertex is an articulation point.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So our algorithm can find out articulation point our program can find out articulation

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: point and if any articulation point is found then we connect the an edge in between two

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: components right from that articulation point the one side is one component the other side

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: is another component we can add an edge between them.

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So for making a graph stronger by removing an articulation point we use this procedure

chunks.title: Articulation Point and Biconnected Components - Abdul Bari

chunks.text: articulation point because the traversal I can start from anywhere then how do you know
